caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on the front, and a gold watch on his left wrist sits in a studio setting. He is wearing headphones and positioned in front of a professional microphone. To his left is a white backdrop featuring a blue star logo and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE." Behind him, a sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table in front of him are a black accessory and a container with "THE TALK ONE" branding. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and mostly stationary, looking slightly to his left with a focused expression. His posture and position relative to the equipment remain constant, with only subtle shifts in his facial expression as he listens or prepares to speak.
